label: Path of the Berserker
description: Pure rage and physical brutality.

label: Path of Wild Magic
description: Chaotic rage fused with unstable magic.

label: College of Lore
description: A knowledge-focused support caster and skill expert.

label: College of Swords
description: A flashy duelist blending performance and combat.

label: Life Domain
description: Pure support, healing, and compassionate durability.

label: Tempest Domain
description: Divine wrath through thunder, lightning, and destructive spectacle.

label: Circle of the Land
description: Spell-focused nature mastery with control and breadth.

label: Circle of the Moon
description: Primal shapeshifting with frontline ferocity.

label: Battle Master
description: Tactical fighter built on precision and control.

label: Champion
description: Straightforward physical excellence and durability.

label: Way of Shadow
description: Stealth-focused monk with covert mobility and precision.

label: Way of the Open Hand
description: Pure disciplined martial control.

label: Oath of Devotion
description: Classic virtuous knight of duty and sacred order.

label: Oath of Vengeance
description: Relentless divine hunter driven by punishment and pursuit.

label: Hunter
description: Focused predator optimized for tactical kills.

label: Gloom Stalker
description: Ambush specialist thriving in darkness and first-strike pressure.

label: Arcane Trickster
description: A rogue who augments cunning with selective magic.

label: Assassin
description: A lethal precision killer focused on ambush and ruthless timing.

label: Draconic Bloodline
description: Explosive innate magic with added durability and regal flair.

label: Wild Magic
description: Unstable power with high chaos and unpredictable burst.

label: The Fiend
description: Aggressive pact magic with destructive and infernal flavor.

label: The Great Old One
description: Alien mental influence, strangeness, and subtle dread.

label: School of Evocation
description: Disciplined magical artillery and battlefield blasting.

label: School of Illusion
description: Subtle reality-bending through deceit and manipulation.
